signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + Inflation Shock
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short -29,582 (specs fading a hawkish RBNZ) vs RBNZ hike bias priced ahead of Q2 CPI due July 21. NZD long% at a 15.2% extreme — an upside CPI surprise triggers a high-conviction short-squeeze. NZD/USD at 0.5841. Risk: Q2 CPI misses expectations and hike pricing fades, removing the squeeze setup.
signals.watch level: New Zealand Q2 CPI release July 21

signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical Tension + Carry + Vol
signals.text: USD/JPY at 162.46 holding above the 160.00 intervention threshold as Trump-Iran escalation drives USD demand. 275bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite a -1.40 moderate put skew in 25d risk reversals. JPY safe-haven function remains impaired (z=-1.98σ vs VIX), meaning carry dominates until VIX exceeds 25. Risk: VIX breaks above 25, reviving JPY safe-haven bid and forcing a carry unwind toward 160.00.
signals.watch level: 160.00 psychological support and BoJ verbal intervention

signals.title: EUR/USD — Positioning + Vol + CESI
signals.text: EUR/USD at 1.1416 under pressure as CESI net -16 (persistent data misses) aligns with COT LF net short -74,637. IV at 7.1% vs HV30 at 4.7% creates a +2.4% VRP, signaling elevated hedging demand ahead of the July 23 ECB meeting. 150bp USD carry advantage limits upside potential. Risk: ECB signals a hawkish hold or a further hike, narrowing the carry gap and lifting EUR/USD out of the pressured range.

signals.title: AUD/CHF — Retail Sentiment Extreme + Carry
signals.text: AUD/CHF retail sentiment at 93% short (extreme) diverges from the +435bp carry advantage favoring AUD. Retail is aggressively fading the RBA-SNB policy gap; contrarian logic suggests a continuation of the AUD bid as retail capitulation risk rises. AUD/USD at 0.7001. Risk: SNB narrows the carry gap or a risk-off shock revives CHF safe-haven demand, validating the crowded retail short instead of squeezing it.
